updated={entry.data.updated}\n                        tags={entry.data.tags}\n                        category={entry.data.category}\n                \u003e\u003c/PostMetadata\u003e\n                {!entry.data.image \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv class=\"border-[var(--line-divider)] border-dashed border-b-[1px] mb-5\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n\n            \u003c!-- always show cover as long as it has one --\u003e\n\n            {entry.data.image \u0026\u0026\n                \u003cImageWrapper id=\"post-cover\" src={entry.data.image} basePath={path.join(\"content/posts/\", getDir(entry.id))} class=\"mb-8 rounded-xl banner-container onload-animation\"/\u003e\n            }\n\n\n            \u003cMarkdown class=\"mb-6 markdown-content onload-animation\"\u003e\n                \u003cContent /\u003e\n            \u003c/Markdown\u003e\n\n            {licenseConfig.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cLicense title={entry.data.title} slug={entry.slug} pubDate={entry.data.published} class=\"mb-6 rounded-xl license-container onload-animation\"\u003e\u003c/License\u003e}\n\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport path from \"node:path\";\nimport License from \"@components/misc/License.astro\";\nimport Markdown from \"@components/misc/Markdown.astro\";\nimport I18nKey from \"@i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"@i18n/translation\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"@layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"@utils/content-utils\";\nimport { getDir, getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport { licenseConfig } from \"src/config\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport PostMetadata from \"../../components/PostMeta.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"../../config\";\nimport { formatDateToYYYYMMDD } from \"../../utils/date-utils\";\n\nexport async function getStaticPaths() {\n\tconst blogEntries = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn blogEntries.map((entry) =\u003e ({\n\t\tparams: { slug: entry.slug },\n\t\tprops: { entry },\n\t}));\n}\n\nconst { entry } = Astro.props;\nconst { Content, headings } = await entry.render();\n\nconst { remarkPluginFrontmatter } = await entry.render();\n\nconst jsonLd = {\n\t\"@context\": \"https://schema.org\",\n\t\"@type\": \"BlogPosting\",\n\theadline: entry.data.title,\n\tdescription: entry.data.description || entry.data.title,\n\tkeywords: entry.data.tags,\n\tauthor: {\n\t\t\"@type\": \"Person\",\n\t\tname: profileConfig.name,\n\t\turl: Astro.site,\n\t},\n\tdatePublished: formatDateToYYYYMMDD(entry.data.published),\n\tinLanguage: entry.data.lang\n\t\t? entry.data.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\")\n\t\t: siteConfig.lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\"),\n\t// TODO include cover image here\n};\n---\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport type { GetStaticPaths } from \"astro\";\nimport Pagination from \"../components/control/Pagination.astro\";\nimport PostPage from \"../components/PostPage.astro\";\nimport { PAGE_SIZE } from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"../layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"../utils/content-utils\";\n\nexport const getStaticPaths = (async ({ paginate }) =\u003e {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn paginate(allBlogPosts, { pageSize: PAGE_SIZE });\n}) satisfies GetStaticPaths;\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6507#issuecomment-1489916992\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nconst len = page.data.length;\n---\n\n\u003cMainGridLayout\u003e\n    \u003cPostPage page={page}\u003e\u003c/PostPage\u003e\n    \u003cPagination class=\"mx-auto onload-animation\" page={page} style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${(len)*50}ms)&#96;}\u003e\u003c/Pagination\u003e\n\u003c/MainGridLayout\u003e",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { GetStaticPaths } from \"astro\";\nimport Pagination from \"../components/control/Pagination.astro\";\nimport PostPage from \"../components/PostPage.astro\";\nimport { PAGE_SIZE } from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"../layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\nimport { getSortedPosts } from \"../utils/content-utils\";\n\nexport const getStaticPaths = (async ({ paginate }) =\u003e {\n\tconst allBlogPosts = await getSortedPosts();\n\treturn paginate(allBlogPosts, { pageSize: PAGE_SIZE });\n}) satisfies GetStaticPaths;\n// https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6507#issuecomment-1489916992\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nconst len = page.data.length;\n---\n\n\u003cMainGridLayout\u003e\n    \u003cPostPage page={page}\u003e\u003c/PostPage\u003e\n    \u003cPagination class=\"mx-auto onload-animation\" page={page} style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${(len)*50}ms)&#96;}\u003e\u003c/Pagination\u003e\n\u003c/MainGridLayout\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport type { CollectionEntry } from \"astro:content\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport PostCard from \"./PostCard.astro\";\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nlet delay = 0;\nconst interval = 50;\n---\n\u003cdiv class=\"transition flex flex-col rounded-[var(--radius-large)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] py-1 md:py-0 md:bg-transparent md:gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e\n    {page.data.map((entry: CollectionEntry\u003c\"posts\"\u003e) =\u003e (\n        \u003cPostCard\n                entry={entry}\n                title={entry.data.title}\n                tags={entry.data.tags}\n                category={entry.data.category}\n                published={entry.data.published}\n                updated={entry.data.updated}\n                url={getPostUrlBySlug(entry.slug)}\n                image={entry.data.image}\n                description={entry.data.description}\n                draft={entry.data.draft}\n                class:list=\"onload-animation\"\n                style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${delay++ * interval}ms);&#96;}\n        \u003e\u003c/PostCard\u003e\n    ))}\n\u003c/div\u003e",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport type { CollectionEntry } from \"astro:content\";\nimport { getPostUrlBySlug } from \"@utils/url-utils\";\nimport PostCard from \"./PostCard.astro\";\n\nconst { page } = Astro.props;\n\nlet delay = 0;\nconst interval = 50;\n---\n\u003cdiv class=\"transition flex flex-col rounded-[var(--radius-large)] bg-[var(--card-bg)] py-1 md:py-0 md:bg-transparent md:gap-4 mb-4\"\u003e\n    {page.data.map((entry: CollectionEntry\u003c\"posts\"\u003e) =\u003e (\n        \u003cPostCard\n                entry={entry}\n                title={entry.data.title}\n                tags={entry.data.tags}\n                category={entry.data.category}\n                published={entry.data.published}\n                updated={entry.data.updated}\n                url={getPostUrlBySlug(entry.slug)}\n                image={entry.data.image}\n                description={entry.data.description}\n                draft={entry.data.draft}\n                class:list=\"onload-animation\"\n                style={&#96;animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + ${delay++ * interval}ms);&#96;}\n        \u003e\u003c/PostCard\u003e\n    ))}\n\u003c/div\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n\n// Check if current page is a post page\nconst isPostPage = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";"
          },

        "originalContents": "---\nimport BackToTop from \"@components/control/BackToTop.astro\";\nimport Footer from \"@components/Footer.astro\";\nimport Navbar from \"@components/Navbar.astro\";\nimport SideBar from \"@components/widget/SideBar.astro\";\nimport type { MarkdownHeading } from \"astro\";\nimport { Icon } from \"astro-icon/components\";\nimport ImageWrapper from \"../components/misc/ImageWrapper.astro\";\nimport TOC from \"../components/widget/TOC.astro\";\nimport { siteConfig } from \"../config\";\nimport {\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tMAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport Layout from \"./Layout.astro\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n\theadings?: MarkdownHeading[];\n}\n\nconst {\n\ttitle,\n\tbanner,\n\tdescription,\n\tlang,\n\tsetOGTypeArticle,\n\theadings = [],\n} = Astro.props;\nconst hasBannerCredit =\n\tsiteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 siteConfig.banner.credit.enable;\nconst hasBannerLink = !!siteConfig.banner.credit.url;\n\nconst mainPanelTop = siteConfig.banner.enable\n\t? &#96;calc(${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh - ${MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT}rem)&#96;\n\t: \"5.5rem\";\n\n// Check if current page is a post page\nconst isPostPage = Astro.url.pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n---\n\n\u003cLayout title={title} banner={banner} description={description} lang={lang} setOGTypeArticle={setOGTypeArticle}\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Navbar --\u003e\n\u003cslot slot=\"head\" name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\u003cdiv id=\"top-row\" class=\"z-50 pointer-events-none relative transition-all duration-700 max-w-[var(--page-width)] px-0 md:px-4 mx-auto\" class:list={[\"\"]}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"navbar-wrapper\" class=\"pointer-events-auto sticky top-0 transition-all\"\u003e\n        \u003cNavbar\u003e\u003c/Navbar\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- Banner --\u003e\n",

        "contents": "---\n\nimport { getEntry, render } from \"astro:content\";\nimport Markdown from \"@components/misc/Markdown.astro\";\nimport I18nKey from \"../i18n/i18nKey\";\nimport { i18n } from \"../i18n/translation\";\nimport MainGridLayout from \"../layouts/MainGridLayout.astro\";\n\nconst aboutPost = await getEntry(\"spec\", \"about\");\n\nif (!aboutPost) {\n\tthrow new Error(\"About page content not found\");\n}\n\nconst { Content } = await render(aboutPost);\n---\n\u003cMainGridLayout title={i18n(I18nKey.about)} description={i18n(I18nKey.about)}\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"flex w-full rounded-[var(--radius-large)] overflow-hidden relative min-h-32\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-base z-10 px-9 py-6 relative w-full \"\u003e\n            \u003cMarkdown class=\"mt-2\"\u003e\n                \u003cContent /\u003e\n            \u003c/Markdown\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/MainGridLayout\u003e",

        "originalContents": "    \u003cdiv class=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between mb-4 gap-4 overflow-hidden w-full\"\u003e\n        \u003ca href={entry.data.nextSlug ? getPostUrlBySlug(entry.data.nextSlug) : \"#\"}\n           class:list={[\"w-full font-bold overflow-hidden active:scale-95\", {\"pointer-events-none\": !entry.data.nextSlug}]}\u003e\n            {entry.data.nextSlug \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv class=\"btn-card rounded-2xl w-full h-[3.75rem] max-w-full px-4 flex items-center !justify-start gap-4\" \u003e\n                \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:chevron-left-rounded\" class=\"text-[2rem] text-[var(--primary)]\" /\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"overflow-hidden transition overflow-ellipsis whitespace-nowrap max-w-[calc(100%_-_3rem)] text-black/75 dark:text-white/75\"\u003e\n                    {entry.data.nextTitle}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e}\n        \u003c/a\u003e\n\n        \u003ca href={entry.data.prevSlug ? getPostUrlBySlug(entry.data.prevSlug) : \"#\"}\n           class:list={[\"w-full font-bold overflow-hidden active:scale-95\", {\"pointer-events-none\": !entry.data.prevSlug}]}\u003e\n            {entry.data.prevSlug \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv class=\"btn-card rounded-2xl w-full h-[3.75rem] max-w-full px-4 flex items-center !justify-end gap-4\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"overflow-hidden transition overflow-ellipsis whitespace-nowrap max-w-[calc(100%_-_3rem)] text-black/75 dark:text-white/75\"\u003e\n                    {entry.data.prevTitle}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:chevron-right-rounded\" class=\"text-[2rem] text-[var(--primary)]\" /\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e}\n        \u003c/a\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c/MainGridLayout\u003e\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const bannerOffsetByPosition = {\n\ttop: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;,\n\tcenter: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 2}vh&#96;,\n\tbottom: \"0\",\n};\nconst bannerOffset =\n\tbannerOffsetByPosition[siteConfig.banner.position || \"center\"];\n---\n\n\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml lang={siteLang} class=\"bg-[var(--page-bg)] transition text-[14px] md:text-[16px]\"\n\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\u003e\n\t\u003chead\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003ctitle\u003e{pageTitle}\u003c/title\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\" /\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"author\" content={profileConfig.name}\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:site_name\" content={siteConfig.title}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:url\" content={Astro.url}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:title\" content={pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t{setOGTypeArticle ? (\n        \u003cmeta property=\"og:type\" content=\"article\" /\u003e\n        ) : (\n        \u003cmeta property=\"og:type\" content=\"website\" /\u003e\n        )}\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"twitter:card\" content=\"summary_large_image\"\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"twitter:url\" content={Astro.url}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"twitter:title\" content={pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"twitter:description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width\" /\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"generator\" content={Astro.generator} /\u003e\n\t\t{favicons.map(favicon =\u003e (\n\t\t\t\u003clink rel=\"icon\"\n\t\t\t\t  href={favicon.src.startsWith('/') ? url(favicon.src) : favicon.src}\n\t\t\t\t  sizes={favicon.sizes}\n\t\t\t\t  media={favicon.theme \u0026\u0026 &#96;(prefers-color-scheme: ${favicon.theme})&#96;}\n\t\t\t/\u003e\n\t\t))}\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- Set the theme before the page is rendered to avoid a flash --\u003e\n",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "};"

          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "const bannerOffset ="

        "originalContents": "const bannerOffsetByPosition = {\n\ttop: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;,\n\tcenter: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 2}vh&#96;,\n\tbottom: \"0\",\n};\nconst bannerOffset =\n\tbannerOffsetByPosition[siteConfig.banner.position || \"center\"];\n---\n\n\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml lang={siteLang} class=\"bg-[var(--page-bg)] transition text-[14px] md:text-[16px]\"\n\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\u003e\n\t\u003chead\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003ctitle\u003e{pageTitle}\u003c/title\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\" /\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"author\" content={profileConfig.name}\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:site_name\" content={siteConfig.title}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:url\" content={Astro.url}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:title\" content={pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t{setOGTypeArticle ? (\n        \u003cmeta property=\"og:type\" content=\"article\" /\u003e\n        ) : (\n        \u003cmeta property=\"og:type\" content=\"website\" /\u003e\n        )}\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"twitter:card\" content=\"summary_large_image\"\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"twitter:url\" content={Astro.url}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"twitter:title\" content={pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"twitter:description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width\" /\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"generator\" content={Astro.generator} /\u003e\n\t\t{favicons.map(favicon =\u003e (\n\t\t\t\u003clink rel=\"icon\"\n\t\t\t\t  href={favicon.src.startsWith('/') ? url(favicon.src) : favicon.src}\n\t\t\t\t  sizes={favicon.sizes}\n\t\t\t\t  media={favicon.theme \u0026\u0026 &#96;(prefers-color-scheme: ${favicon.theme})&#96;}\n\t\t\t/\u003e\n\t\t))}\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- Set the theme before the page is rendered to avoid a flash --\u003e\n",

        "contents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

        "originalContents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/400.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/500.css\";\nimport \"@fontsource/roboto/700.css\";\n\nimport ConfigCarrier from \"@components/ConfigCarrier.astro\";\nimport { profileConfig, siteConfig } from \"@/config\";\nimport {\n\tAUTO_MODE,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND,\n\tBANNER_HEIGHT_HOME,\n\tDARK_MODE,\n\tDEFAULT_THEME,\n\tLIGHT_MODE,\n\tPAGE_WIDTH,\n} from \"../constants/constants\";\nimport { defaultFavicons } from \"../constants/icon\";\nimport type { Favicon } from \"../types/config\";\nimport { pathsEqual, url } from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport \"katex/dist/katex.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\ttitle?: string;\n\tbanner?: string;\n\tdescription?: string;\n\tlang?: string;\n\tsetOGTypeArticle?: boolean;\n}\n\nlet { title, banner, description, lang, setOGTypeArticle } = Astro.props;\n\n// apply a class to the body element to decide the height of the banner, only used for initial page load\n// Swup can update the body for each page visit, but it's after the page transition, causing a delay for banner height change\n// so use Swup hooks instead to change the height immediately when a link is clicked\nconst isHomePage = pathsEqual(Astro.url.pathname, url(\"/\"));\n\n// defines global css variables\n// why doing this in Layout instead of GlobalStyles: https://github.com/withastro/astro/issues/6728#issuecomment-1502203757\nconst configHue = siteConfig.themeColor.hue;\nif (!banner || typeof banner !== \"string\" || banner.trim() === \"\") {\n\tbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n}\n\n// TODO don't use post cover as banner for now\nbanner = siteConfig.banner.src;\n\nconst enableBanner = siteConfig.banner.enable;\n\nlet pageTitle: string;\nif (title) {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${title} - ${siteConfig.title}&#96;;\n} else {\n\tpageTitle = &#96;${siteConfig.title} - ${siteConfig.subtitle}&#96;;\n}\n\nconst favicons: Favicon[] =\n\tsiteConfig.favicon.length \u003e 0 ? siteConfig.favicon : defaultFavicons;\n\n// const siteLang = siteConfig.lang.replace('_', '-')\nif (!lang) {\n\tlang = &#96;${siteConfig.lang}&#96;;\n}\nconst siteLang = lang.replace(\"_\", \"-\");\n\n",

        "contents": "{siteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv id=\"banner-wrapper\" class={&#96;absolute z-10 w-full transition duration-700 overflow-hidden&#96;} style={&#96;top: -${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003cImageWrapper id=\"banner\" alt=\"Banner image of the blog\" class:list={[\"object-cover h-full transition duration-700 opacity-0 scale-105\"]}\n                  src={siteConfig.banner.src} position={siteConfig.banner.position}\n    \u003e\n    \u003c/ImageWrapper\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e}\n\n\u003c!-- Main content --\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"absolute w-full z-30 pointer-events-none\" style={&#96;top: ${mainPanelTop}&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003c!-- The pointer-events-none here prevent blocking the click event of the TOC --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"relative max-w-[var(--page-width)] mx-auto pointer-events-auto overflow-x-hidden\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv id=\"main-grid\" class:list={[\n            \"transition duration-700 w-full min-w-0 left-0 right-0 grid grid-rows-[auto_1fr_auto] lg:grid-rows-[auto] mx-auto lg:gap-4 px-0 md:px-4\",\n            isPostPage ? \"grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[auto]\" : \"grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]\"\n        ]}\n",

        "originalContents": "{siteConfig.banner.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv id=\"banner-wrapper\" class={&#96;absolute z-10 w-full transition duration-700 overflow-hidden&#96;} style={&#96;top: -${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003cImageWrapper id=\"banner\" alt=\"Banner image of the blog\" class:list={[\"object-cover h-full transition duration-700 opacity-0 scale-105\"]}\n                  src={siteConfig.banner.src} position={siteConfig.banner.position}\n    \u003e\n    \u003c/ImageWrapper\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e}\n\n\u003c!-- Main content --\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"absolute w-full z-30 pointer-events-none\" style={&#96;top: ${mainPanelTop}&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003c!-- The pointer-events-none here prevent blocking the click event of the TOC --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"relative max-w-[var(--page-width)] mx-auto pointer-events-auto overflow-x-hidden\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv id=\"main-grid\" class:list={[\n            \"transition duration-700 w-full min-w-0 left-0 right-0 grid grid-rows-[auto_1fr_auto] lg:grid-rows-[auto] mx-auto lg:gap-4 px-0 md:px-4\",\n            isPostPage ? \"grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[auto]\" : \"grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]\"\n        ]}\n",

        "contents": "        \u003e\n            \u003c!-- Banner image credit --\u003e\n            {hasBannerCredit \u0026\u0026 \u003ca href={siteConfig.banner.credit.url} id=\"banner-credit\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\" aria-label=\"Visit image source\"\n                                   class:list={[\"group onload-animation transition-all absolute flex justify-center items-center rounded-full \" +\n                                   \"px-3 right-4 -top-[3.25rem] bg-black/60 hover:bg-black/70 h-9\", {\"hover:pr-9 active:bg-black/80\": hasBannerLink}]}\n            \u003e\n                \u003cIcon class=\"text-white/75 text-[1.25rem] mr-1\" name=\"material-symbols:copyright-outline-rounded\" \u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"text-white/75 text-xs\"\u003e{siteConfig.banner.credit.text}\u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cIcon class:list={[\"transition absolute text-[oklch(0.75_0.14_var(--hue))] right-4 text-[0.75rem] opacity-0\",\n                    {\"group-hover:opacity-100\": hasBannerLink}]}\n                      name=\"fa6-solid:arrow-up-right-from-square\"\u003e\n                \u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/a\u003e}\n\n\n            \u003cSideBar class=\"mb-4 row-start-2 row-end-3 col-span-2 lg:row-start-1 lg:row-end-2 lg:col-span-1 lg:max-w-[17.5rem] onload-animation\" headings={headings}\u003e\u003c/SideBar\u003e\n\n            \u003cmain id=\"swup-container\" class:list={[\n                \"transition-swup-fade overflow-hidden min-w-0\",\n                isPostPage ? \"col-span-1\" : \"col-span-2 lg:col-span-1\"\n            ]}\u003e\n                \u003cdiv id=\"content-wrapper\" class=\"onload-animation\"\u003e\n                    \u003c!-- the overflow-hidden here prevent long text break the layout--\u003e\n                    \u003c!-- make id different from windows.swup global property --\u003e\n                    \u003cslot\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"footer col-span-2 onload-animation hidden lg:block\"\u003e\n                        \u003cFooter\u003e\u003c/Footer\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/main\u003e\n\n",

        "contents": "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://frontmatter.codes/frontmatter.schema.json\",\n  \"frontMatter.framework.id\": \"astro\",\n  \"frontMatter.preview.host\": \"http://localhost:4321\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.publicFolder\": \"public\",\n  \"frontMatter.content.pageFolders\": [\n    {\n      \"title\": \"posts\",\n      \"path\": \"[[workspace]]/src/content/posts\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"frontMatter.taxonomy.contentTypes\": [\n    {\n      \"name\": \"default\",\n      \"pageBundle\": true,\n      \"previewPath\": \"'blog'\",\n      \"filePrefix\": null,\n      \"clearEmpty\": true,\n      \"fields\": [\n        {\n          \"title\": \"title\",\n          \"name\": \"title\",\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"single\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"description\",\n          \"name\": \"description\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"published\",\n          \"name\": \"published\",\n          \"type\": \"datetime\",\n          \"default\": \"{{now}}\",\n          \"isPublishDate\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"preview\",\n          \"name\": \"image\",\n          \"type\": \"image\",\n          \"isPreviewImage\": true\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"tags\",\n          \"name\": \"tags\",\n          \"type\": \"list\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"category\",\n          \"name\": \"category\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"draft\",\n          \"name\": \"draft\",\n          \"type\": \"boolean\"\n        },\n        {\n          \"title\": \"language\",\n          \"name\": \"language\",\n          \"type\": \"string\"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n",

        "contents": "            \u003cdiv class=\"footer col-span-2 onload-animation block lg:hidden\"\u003e\n                \u003cFooter\u003e\u003c/Footer\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n\n        \u003cBackToTop\u003e\u003c/BackToTop\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003c!-- The things that should be under the banner, only the TOC for now --\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"absolute w-full z-0 hidden 2xl:block\"\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"relative max-w-[var(--page-width)] mx-auto\"\u003e\n        \u003c!-- TOC component --\u003e\n        {siteConfig.toc.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv id=\"toc-wrapper\" class:list={[\"hidden lg:block transition absolute top-0 -right-[var(--toc-width)] w-[var(--toc-width)] items-center\",\n            {\"toc-hide\": siteConfig.banner.enable}]}\n        \u003e\n            \u003cdiv id=\"toc-inner-wrapper\" class=\"fixed top-14 w-[var(--toc-width)] h-[calc(100vh_-_20rem)] overflow-y-scroll overflow-x-hidden hide-scrollbar\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv id=\"toc\" class=\"w-full h-full transition-swup-fade \"\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"h-8 w-full\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n                    \u003cTOC headings={headings}\u003e\u003c/TOC\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"h-8 w-full\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e}\n\n        \u003c!-- #toc needs to exist for Swup to work normally --\u003e\n        {!siteConfig.toc.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv id=\"toc\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e}\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/Layout\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "---\nimport \"@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono\";\nimport \"@fontsource-variable/jetbrains-mono/wght-italic.css\";\n\ninterface Props {\n\tclass: string;\n}\nconst className = Astro.props.class;\n---\n\u003cdiv data-pagefind-body class={&#96;prose dark:prose-invert prose-base !max-w-none custom-md ${className}&#96;}\u003e\n    \u003c!--\u003cdiv class=\"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none custom-md\"\u003e--\u003e\n    \u003c!--\u003cdiv class=\"max-w-none custom-md\"\u003e--\u003e\n    \u003cslot/\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\ndocument.addEventListener(\"click\", function (e: MouseEvent) {\n    const target = e.target as Element | null;\n    if (target \u0026\u0026 target.classList.contains(\"copy-btn\")) {\n        const preEle = target.closest(\"pre\");\n        const codeEle = preEle?.querySelector(\"code\");\n        const code = Array.from(codeEle?.querySelectorAll(\".code:not(summary *)\") ?? [])\n            .map(el =\u003e el.textContent)\n            .map(t =\u003e t === \"\\n\" ? \"\" : t)\n            .join(\"\\n\");\n        navigator.clipboard.writeText(code);\n\n        const timeoutId = target.getAttribute(\"data-timeout-id\");\n        if (timeoutId) {\n            clearTimeout(parseInt(timeoutId));\n        }\n\n        target.classList.add(\"success\");\n\n        // 设置新的timeout并保存ID到按钮的自定义属性中\n        const newTimeoutId = setTimeout(() =\u003e {\n            target.classList.remove(\"success\");\n        }, 1000);\n\n        target.setAttribute(\"data-timeout-id\", newTimeoutId.toString());\n    }\n});\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".mt50 {\n  margin-top: 50px !important;\n}\n.mb50 {\n  margin-bottom: 50px !important;\n}\n// あまり作成しすぎるとCSSコード量も増えるので程々に\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n- リストマーカー用の連番を使った class名 を作成する\n- 連番を使ったclass名のゼロパディング（0埋め）をする\n\n- 文字リンクカラーのミックスインを作る\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;scss\n@mixin link-color2($n) {\n    color: $n;\n    \u0026:hover {\n        color: lighten($n, 30%);\n        text-decoration: none;\n    }\n}\na {\n  @include link-color2(#f00);\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n- 複数の値を&#96;@each&#96;でループし、ページによって背景を変更する\n- シンプルなグラデーションのミックスインを作る\n- Map型と&#96;@each&#96;を使ってSNSアイコンを管理する\n\n- 値が比較しづらい &#96;z-index&#96; をMap型で一括管理する\n\n- メディアクエリ用のミックスインを作成して楽々レスポンシブ対応\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;scss\n$breakpoints: (\n    xs: \"only screen and (max-width: 320px)\",\n    s: \"only screen and (max-width: 575px)\",\n    m: \"only screen and (max-width: 767px)\",\n    l: \"only screen and (max-width: 991px)\",\n    xl: \"only screen and (max-width: 1199px)\",\n);\n@mixin media($breakpoint) {\n    @media #{map-get($breakpoints, $breakpoint)} {\n        @content;\n    }\n}\nbody {\n    background-color: white;\n    @include media(l) {\n        background-color: blue;\n    }\n    @include media(m) {\n        background-color: green;\n    }\n    @include media(xs) {\n        background-color: red;\n    }\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 5-3 スマホ・マルチデバイス、ブラウザで使えるテクニック\n\n### 5-4 gulpのタスクを追加してもっと便利な環境にする\n\n- パーシャルファイルを一括で読み込む\n- ソースマップでコンパイル前のソース場所を知る\n- エラー時にWatchを停止させずに、自動コンパイルを継続させる\n- エラーに気づきやすくするために通知を出す\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\t\t\u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{DEFAULT_THEME, LIGHT_MODE, DARK_MODE, AUTO_MODE, BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND, PAGE_WIDTH, configHue}}\u003e\n\t\t\t// Load the theme from local storage\n\t\t\tconst theme = localStorage.getItem('theme') || DEFAULT_THEME;\n\t\t\tswitch (theme) {\n\t\t\t\tcase LIGHT_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase DARK_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase AUTO_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tif (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Load the hue from local storage\n\t\t\tconst hue = localStorage.getItem('hue') || configHue;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--hue', hue);\n\n\t\t\t// calculate the --banner-height-extend, which needs to be a multiple of 4 to avoid blurry text\n\t\t\tlet offset = Math.floor(window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 100));\n\t\t\toffset = offset - offset % 4;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--banner-height-extend', &#96;${offset}px&#96;);\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\t\t\u003cstyle define:vars={{\n\t\t\tconfigHue,\n\t\t\t'page-width': &#96;${PAGE_WIDTH}rem&#96;,\n\t\t}}\u003e\u003c/style\u003e  \u003c!-- defines global css variables. This will be applied to \u003chtml\u003e \u003cbody\u003e and some other elements idk why --\u003e\n\n\n\t\t\u003cslot name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003clink rel=\"alternate\" type=\"application/rss+xml\" title={profileConfig.name} href={&#96;${Astro.site}rss.xml&#96;}/\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- MermaidJS --\u003e\n\t\t\u003cscript type=\"module\"\u003e\n\t\t\timport mermaid from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs';\n\t\t\tmermaid.initialize({ \n\t\t\t\tstartOnLoad: true,\n\t\t\t\ttheme: 'dark',\n\t\t\t\tsecurityLevel: 'loose'\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\twindow.mermaid = mermaid;\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\t\u003c/head\u003e\n\t\u003cbody class=\" min-h-screen transition \" class:list={[{\"lg:is-home\": isHomePage, \"enable-banner\": enableBanner}]}\n\t\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\t",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\t\t\u003cscript is:inline define:vars={{DEFAULT_THEME, LIGHT_MODE, DARK_MODE, AUTO_MODE, BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND, PAGE_WIDTH, configHue}}\u003e\n\t\t\t// Load the theme from local storage\n\t\t\tconst theme = localStorage.getItem('theme') || DEFAULT_THEME;\n\t\t\tswitch (theme) {\n\t\t\t\tcase LIGHT_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase DARK_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\tcase AUTO_MODE:\n\t\t\t\t\tif (window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Load the hue from local storage\n\t\t\tconst hue = localStorage.getItem('hue') || configHue;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--hue', hue);\n\n\t\t\t// calculate the --banner-height-extend, which needs to be a multiple of 4 to avoid blurry text\n\t\t\tlet offset = Math.floor(window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 100));\n\t\t\toffset = offset - offset % 4;\n\t\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--banner-height-extend', &#96;${offset}px&#96;);\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\t\t\u003cstyle define:vars={{\n\t\t\tconfigHue,\n\t\t\t'page-width': &#96;${PAGE_WIDTH}rem&#96;,\n\t\t}}\u003e\u003c/style\u003e  \u003c!-- defines global css variables. This will be applied to \u003chtml\u003e \u003cbody\u003e and some other elements idk why --\u003e\n\n\n\t\t\u003cslot name=\"head\"\u003e\u003c/slot\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003clink rel=\"alternate\" type=\"application/rss+xml\" title={profileConfig.name} href={&#96;${Astro.site}rss.xml&#96;}/\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- MermaidJS --\u003e\n\t\t\u003cscript type=\"module\"\u003e\n\t\t\timport mermaid from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.esm.min.mjs';\n\t\t\tmermaid.initialize({ \n\t\t\t\tstartOnLoad: true,\n\t\t\t\ttheme: 'dark',\n\t\t\t\tsecurityLevel: 'loose'\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\twindow.mermaid = mermaid;\n\t\t\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\t\u003c/head\u003e\n\t\u003cbody class=\" min-h-screen transition \" class:list={[{\"lg:is-home\": isHomePage, \"enable-banner\": enableBanner}]}\n\t\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\t",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function toggleSidebarForPostPage(pathname: string) {\n\tconst sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n\tconst mainGrid = document.getElementById('main-grid');\n\tconst mainContainer = document.getElementById('swup-container');\n\t\n\tif (!sidebar || !mainGrid || !mainContainer) return;\n\t\n\tconst isPostPage = pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n\t\n\tif (isPostPage) {\n\t\t// Hide sidebar and adjust grid layout for post pages\n\t\tsidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-1');\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Show sidebar and restore normal grid layout\n\t\tsidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t}\n}\n\n// Initialize on page load\ntoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\n// Setup Swup hooks for client-side navigation\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility immediately when navigation starts\n\t\tconst url = new URL(visit.to.url, window.location.origin);\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(url.pathname);\n\t});\n\t\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility after content is replaced\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\t});\n};\n\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup();\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup);\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "function toggleSidebarForPostPage(pathname: string) {\n\tconst sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n\tconst mainGrid = document.getElementById('main-grid');\n\tconst mainContainer = document.getElementById('swup-container');\n\t\n\tif (!sidebar || !mainGrid || !mainContainer) return;\n\t\n\tconst isPostPage = pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n\t\n\tif (isPostPage) {\n\t\t// Hide sidebar and adjust grid layout for post pages\n\t\tsidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-1');\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Show sidebar and restore normal grid layout\n\t\tsidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t}\n}\n\n// Initialize on page load\ntoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\n// Setup Swup hooks for client-side navigation\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility immediately when navigation starts\n\t\tconst url = new URL(visit.to.url, window.location.origin);\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(url.pathname);\n\t});\n\t\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility after content is replaced\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\t});\n};\n\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup();\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup);\n}\n\u003c/script\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003e\n\t\t\u003cConfigCarrier\u003e\u003c/ConfigCarrier\u003e\n\t\t\u003cslot /\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003c!-- increase the page height during page transition to prevent the scrolling animation from jumping --\u003e\n\t\t\u003cdiv id=\"page-height-extend\" class=\"hidden h-[300vh]\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\t\u003c/body\u003e\n\u003c/html\u003e\n\n\u003cstyle is:global define:vars={{\n\tbannerOffset,\n\t'banner-height-home': &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_HOME}vh&#96;,\n\t'banner-height': &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT}vh&#96;,\n}}\u003e\n@tailwind components;\n@layer components {\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #banner-wrapper {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)] translate-y-[var(--banner-height-extend)]\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner #banner-wrapper {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)]\n\t}\n\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #banner {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)] translate-y-0\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner #banner {\n\t\t@apply h-[var(--banner-height-home)] translate-y-[var(--bannerOffset)]\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #main-grid {\n\t\t@apply translate-y-[var(--banner-height-extend)];\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner #top-row {\n\t\t@apply h-[calc(var(--banner-height-home)_-_4.5rem)] transition-all duration-300\n\t}\n\t.enable-banner.is-home #sidebar-sticky {\n\t\t@apply top-[calc(1rem_-_var(--banner-height-extend))]\n\t}\n\t.navbar-hidden {\n\t\t@apply opacity-0 -translate-y-16\n\t}\n}\n\u003c/style\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\nimport 'overlayscrollbars/overlayscrollbars.css';\nimport {\n\tOverlayScrollbars,\n\t// ScrollbarsHidingPlugin,\n\t// SizeObserverPlugin,\n\t// ClickScrollPlugin\n} from 'overlayscrollbars';\nimport {getHue, getStoredTheme, setHue, setTheme} from \"../utils/setting-utils\";\nimport {pathsEqual, url} from \"../utils/url-utils\";\nimport fonts */\n// (async function() {\n// \ttry {\n// \t\tawait Promise.all([\n// \t\t\tdocument.fonts.load(\"400 1em Roboto\"),\n// \t\t\tdocument.fonts.load(\"700 1em Roboto\"),\n// \t\t]);\n//         "contents": "const bannerOffsetByPosition = {\n\ttop: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND}vh&#96;,\n\tcenter: &#96;${BANNER_HEIGHT_EXTEND / 2}vh&#96;,\n\tbottom: \"0\",\n};\nconst bannerOffset =\n\tbannerOffsetByPosition[siteConfig.banner.position || \"center\"];\n---\n\n\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\n\u003chtml lang={siteLang} class=\"bg-[var(--page-bg)] transition text-[14px] md:text-[16px]\"\n\t  data-overlayscrollbars-initialize\n\u003e\n\t\u003chead\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003ctitle\u003e{pageTitle}\u003c/title\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\" /\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta name=\"author\" content={profileConfig.name}\u003e\n\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:site_name\" content={siteConfig.title}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:url\" content={Astro.url}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:title\" content={pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t\u003cmeta property=\"og:description\" content={description || pageTitle}\u003e\n\t\t{setOGTypeArticle ?         "contents": "\n    \u003c!-- search bar inside panel for phone/tablet --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"search-bar-inside\" class=\"flex relative lg:hidden transition-all items-center h-11 rounded-xl\n      bg-black/[0.04] hover:bg-black/[0.06] focus-within:bg-black/[0.06]\n      dark:bg-white/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 dark:focus-within:bg-white/10\n  \"\u003e\n        \u003cIcon icon=\"material-symbols:search\" class=\"absolute text-[1.25rem] pointer-events-none ml-3 transition my-auto text-black/30 dark:text-white/30\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n        \u003cinput placeholder=\"Search\" bind:value={keywordMobile}\n               class=\"pl-10 absolute inset-0 text-sm bg-transparent outline-0\n               focus:w-60 text-black/50 dark:text-white/50\"\n        \u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- search results --\u003e\n    {#each result as item}\n        \u003ca href={item.url}\n           class=\"transition first-of-type:mt-2 lg:first-of-type:mt-0 group block\n       rounded-xl text-lg px-3 py-2 hover:bg-[var(--btn-plain-bg-hover)] active:bg-[var(--btn-plain-bg-active)]\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"transition text-90 inline-flex font-bold group-hover:text-[var(--primary)]\"\u003e\n                {item.meta.title}\u003cIcon icon=\"fa6-solid:chevron-right\" class=\"transition text-[0.75rem] translate-x-1 my-auto text-[var(--primary)]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"transition text-sm text-50\"\u003e\n                {@html item.excerpt}\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/a\u003e\n    {/each}\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cstyle\u003e\n  input:focus {\n    outline: 0;\n  }\n  .search-panel {\n    max-height: calc(100vh - 100px);\n    overflow-y: auto;\n  }\n\u003c/style\u003e\n",

        "contents": "        \u003cdiv class=\"flex\"\u003e\n            \u003c!--\u003cSearchPanel client:load\u003e--\u003e\n            \u003cSearch client:only=\"svelte\"\u003e\u003c/Search\u003e\n            {!siteConfig.themeColor.fixed \u0026\u0026 (\n                    \u003cbutton aria-label=\"Display Settings\" class=\"btn-plain scale-animation rounded-lg h-11 w-11 active:scale-90\" id=\"display-settings-switch\"\u003e\n                        \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:palette-outline\" class=\"text-[1.25rem]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n                    \u003c/button\u003e\n            )}\n            \u003cLightDarkSwitch client:only=\"svelte\"\u003e\u003c/LightDarkSwitch\u003e\n            \u003cbutton aria-label=\"Menu\" name=\"Nav Menu\" class=\"btn-plain scale-animation rounded-lg w-11 h-11 active:scale-90 md:!hidden\" id=\"nav-menu-switch\"\u003e\n                \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:menu-rounded\" class=\"text-[1.25rem]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cNavMenuPanel links={links}\u003e\u003c/NavMenuPanel\u003e\n        \u003cDisplaySettings client:only=\"svelte\"\u003e\u003c/DisplaySettings\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\nfunction switchTheme() {\n    if (localStorage.theme === 'dark') {\n        document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n        localStorage.theme = 'light';\n    } else {\n        document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n        localStorage.theme = 'dark';\n    }\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "        \u003cdiv class=\"flex\"\u003e\n            \u003c!--\u003cSearchPanel client:load\u003e--\u003e\n            \u003cSearch client:only=\"svelte\"\u003e\u003c/Search\u003e\n            {!siteConfig.themeColor.fixed \u0026\u0026 (\n                    \u003cbutton aria-label=\"Display Settings\" class=\"btn-plain scale-animation rounded-lg h-11 w-11 active:scale-90\" id=\"display-settings-switch\"\u003e\n                        \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:palette-outline\" class=\"text-[1.25rem]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n                    \u003c/button\u003e\n            )}\n            \u003cLightDarkSwitch client:only=\"svelte\"\u003e\u003c/LightDarkSwitch\u003e\n            \u003cbutton aria-label=\"Menu\" name=\"Nav Menu\" class=\"btn-plain scale-animation rounded-lg w-11 h-11 active:scale-90 md:!hidden\" id=\"nav-menu-switch\"\u003e\n                \u003cIcon name=\"material-symbols:menu-rounded\" class=\"text-[1.25rem]\"\u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cNavMenuPanel links={links}\u003e\u003c/NavMenuPanel\u003e\n        \u003cDisplaySettings client:only=\"svelte\"\u003e\u003c/DisplaySettings\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\nfunction switchTheme() {\n    if (localStorage.theme === 'dark') {\n        document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');\n        localStorage.theme = 'light';\n    } else {\n        document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');\n        localStorage.theme = 'dark';\n    }\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "        \u003e\n            \u003c!-- Banner image credit --\u003e\n            {hasBannerCredit \u0026\u0026 \u003ca href={siteConfig.banner.credit.url} id=\"banner-credit\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\" aria-label=\"Visit image source\"\n                                   class:list={[\"group onload-animation transition-all absolute flex justify-center items-center rounded-full \" +\n                                   \"px-3 right-4 -top-[3.25rem] bg-black/60 hover:bg-black/70 h-9\", {\"hover:pr-9 active:bg-black/80\": hasBannerLink}]}\n            \u003e\n                \u003cIcon class=\"text-white/75 text-[1.25rem] mr-1\" name=\"material-symbols:copyright-outline-rounded\" \u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"text-white/75 text-xs\"\u003e{siteConfig.banner.credit.text}\u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cIcon class:list={[\"transition absolute text-[oklch(0.75_0.14_var(--hue))] right-4 text-[0.75rem] opacity-0\",\n                    {\"group-hover:opacity-100\": hasBannerLink}]}\n                      name=\"fa6-solid:arrow-up-right-from-square\"\u003e\n                \u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/a\u003e}\n\n\n            \u003cSideBar class=\"mb-4 row-start-2 row-end-3 col-span-2 lg:row-start-1 lg:row-end-2 lg:col-span-1 lg:max-w-[17.5rem] onload-animation\" headings={headings}\u003e\u003c/SideBar\u003e\n\n            \u003cmain id=\"swup-container\" class:list={[\n                \"transition-swup-fade overflow-hidden min-w-0\",\n                isPostPage ? ```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,157 @@
- 
+ ---
+ import type { MarkdownHeading } from "astro";
+ import { Icon } from "astro-icon/components";
+ import { siteConfig } from "../config";
+ import { url } from "../utils/url-utils";
+ 
+ interface Props {
+ 	headings: MarkdownHeading[];
+ }
+ 
+ let { headings = [] } = Astro.props;
+ 
+ let minDepth = 10;
+ for (const heading of headings) {
+ 	minDepth = Math.min(minDepth, heading.depth);
+ }
+ 
+ const maxLevel = siteConfig.toc.depth;
+ 
+ const removeTailingHash = (text: string) =&gt; {
+ 	let lastIndexOfHash = text.lastIndexOf("#");
+ 	if (lastIndexOfHash !== text.length - 1) {
+ 		return text;
+ 	}
+ 	return text.substring(0, lastIndexOfHash);
+ };
+ 
+ let heading1Count = 1;
+ ---
+ 
+ &lt;div id="mobile-post-header" class="fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 hidden md:hidden bg-[var(--card-bg)] shadow-lg transition-transform duration-300 -translate-y-full"&gt;
+ 	&lt;div class="card-base !rounded-none h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-4"&gt;
+ 		&lt;!-- HOMEリンク --&gt;
+ 		&lt;a href={url('/')} class="btn-plain scale-animation rounded-lg h-10 px-4 font-bold active:scale-95"&gt;
+ 			&lt;div class="flex flex-row text-[var(--primary)] items-center text-sm"&gt;
+ 				&lt;Icon name="material-symbols:home-outline-rounded" class="text-[1.5rem] mr-1" /&gt;
+ 				&lt;span class="hidden sm:inline"&gt;{siteConfig.title}&lt;/span&gt;
+ 			&lt;/div&gt;
+ 		&lt;/a&gt;
+ 
+ 		&lt;!-- 目次メニューボタン --&gt;
+ 		&lt;div class="relative"&gt;
+ 			&lt;button 
+ 				id="mobile-toc-toggle" 
+ 				aria-label="目次メニュー" 
+ 				class="btn-plain scale-animation rounded-lg h-10 w-10 active:scale-90 flex items-center justify-center"
+ 			&gt;
+ 				&lt;Icon name="material-symbols:menu-rounded" class="text-[1.5rem]"&gt;&lt;/Icon&gt;
+ 			&lt;/button&gt;
+ 
+ 			&lt;!-- ドロップダウンメニュー --&gt;
+ 			&lt;div 
+ 				id="mobile-toc-dropdown" 
+ 				class="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] max-w-sm max-h-[70vh] overflow-y-auto bg-[var(--card-bg)] rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-[var(--line-divider)] hidden"
+ 			&gt;
+ 				&lt;div class="p-4"&gt;
+ 					&lt;div class="text-sm font-bold mb-3 text-black/90 dark:text-white/90"&gt;目次&lt;/div&gt;
+ 					&lt;div class="space-y-1"&gt;
+ 						{headings.filter((heading) =&gt; heading.depth &lt; minDepth + maxLevel).map((heading) =&gt;
+ 							&lt;a 
+ 								href={&#96;#${heading.slug}&#96;} 
+ 								class="mobile-toc-link px-3 py-2 flex gap-2 relative transition w-full min-h-9 rounded-xl hover:bg-[var(--toc-btn-hover)] active:bg-[var(--toc-btn-active)]"
+ 							&gt;
+ 								&lt;div class:list={["transition w-5 h-5 shrink-0 rounded-lg text-xs flex items-center justify-center font-bold",
+ 									{
+ 										"bg-[var(--toc-badge-bg)] text-[var(--btn-content)]": heading.depth == minDepth,
+ 										"ml-4": heading.depth == minDepth + 1,
+ 										"ml-8": heading.depth == minDepth + 2,
+ 									}
+ 								]}&gt;
+ 									{heading.depth == minDepth &amp;&amp; heading1Count++}
+ 									{heading.depth == minDepth + 1 &amp;&amp; &lt;div class="transition w-2 h-2 rounded-[0.1875rem] bg-[var(--toc-badge-bg)]"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;}
+ 									{heading.depth == minDepth + 2 &amp;&amp; &lt;div class="transition w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-sm bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/10"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;}
+ 								&lt;/div&gt;
+ 								&lt;div class:list={["transition text-sm", {
+ 									"text-50": heading.depth == minDepth || heading.depth == minDepth + 1,
+ 									"text-30": heading.depth == minDepth + 2,
+ 								}]}&gt;{removeTailingHash(heading.text)}&lt;/div&gt;
+ 							&lt;/a&gt;
+ 						)}
+ 					&lt;/div&gt;
+ 				&lt;/div&gt;
+ 			&lt;/div&gt;
+ 		&lt;/div&gt;
+ 	&lt;/div&gt;
+ &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;script&gt;
+ 	(function() {
+ 		const header = document.getElementById('mobile-post-header');
+ 		const tocToggle = document.getElementById('mobile-toc-toggle');
+ 		const tocDropdown = document.getElementById('mobile-toc-dropdown');
+ 		const tocLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-toc-link');
+ 
+ 		if (!header || !tocToggle || !tocDropdown) return;
+ 
+ 		let isScrolled = false;
+ 		let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
+ 
+ 		// スクロールイベントの処理
+ 		function handleScroll() {
+ 			const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;
+ 			const scrollThreshold = 100; // 100pxスクロールしたら表示
+ 
+ 			// スクロールダウン時
+ 			if (currentScrollY &gt; scrollThreshold &amp;&amp; !isScrolled) {
+ 				header.classList.remove('-translate-y-full');
+ 				isScrolled = true;
+ 			}
+ 			// スクロールアップ時（トップに近い場合）
+ 			else if (currentScrollY &lt;= scrollThreshold &amp;&amp; isScrolled) {
+ 				header.classList.add('-translate-y-full');
+ 				isScrolled = false;
+ 				// ドロップダウンも閉じる
+ 				tocDropdown.classList.add('hidden');
+ 			}
+ 
+ 			lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
+ 		}
+ 
+ 		// 目次メニューの開閉
+ 		tocToggle.addEventListener('click', (e) =&gt; {
+ 			e.stopPropagation();
+ 			tocDropdown.classList.toggle('hidden');
+ 		});
+ 
+ 		// ドロップダウン外をクリックしたら閉じる
+ 		document.addEventListener('click', (e) =&gt; {
+ 			if (!tocDropdown.contains(e.target as Node) &amp;&amp; !tocToggle.contains(e.target as Node)) {
+ 				tocDropdown.classList.add('hidden');
+ 			}
+ 		});
+ 
+ 		// 目次リンクをクリックしたらドロップダウンを閉じる
+ 		tocLinks.forEach(link =&gt; {
+ 			link.addEventListener('click', () =&gt; {
+ 				tocDropdown.classList.add('hidden');
+ 			});
+ 		});
+ 
+ 		// スクロールイベントリスナーを追加
+ 		window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });
+ 
+ 		// 初期状態を設定
+ 		handleScroll();
+ 	})();
+ &lt;/script&gt;
+ 
+ &lt;style&gt;
+ 	/* スマホ表示のみ表示 */
+ 	@media (min-width: 768px) {
+ 		#mobile-post-header {
+ 			display: none !important;
+ 		}
+ 	}
+ &lt;/style&gt;
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent (default)**_


実装を完了しました。スマホ表示でブログ記事をスクロールした際に、画面上部にヘッダーを表示する機能を追加しました。

## 実装内容

### 1. `MobilePostHeader.astro`コンポーネントの作成
- スマホ表示のみ（768px以上では非表示）
- 左側：HOMEへのリンク（サイトタイトルとホームアイコン）
- 右側：目次メニューボタン（クリックでドロップダウンメニューが開く）

### 2. スクロール機能
- 100px以上スクロールでヘッダーを表示
- トップに戻ると自動で非表示
- スムーズなアニメーション

### 3. 目次ドロップダウンメニュー
- 目次ボタンクリックで開閉
- メニュー外をクリックで自動で閉じる
- 目次リンククリックで自動で閉じる
- 既存のTOCコンポーネントと同じスタイル

### 4. Swupとの互換性
- ページ遷移時にイベントリスナーを適切にクリーンアップ
- 新しいページ読み込み時に再初期化

ブログ記事ページ（`/posts/`で始まるページ）でのみ表示され、スマホ表示（768px未満）でのみ有効です。

        "contents": "*/\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('link:click', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Remove the delay for the first time page load\n\t\tdocument.documentElement.style.setProperty('--content-delay', '0ms')\n\n\t\t// prevent elements from overlapping the navbar\n\t\tif (!bannerEnabled) {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet threshold = window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT / 100) - 72 - 16\n\t\tlet navbar = document.getElementById('navbar-wrapper')\n\t\tif (!navbar || !document.body.classList.contains('lg:is-home')) {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\tinitCustomScrollbar();\n\t\t// Reinitialize MermaidJS after content replacement\n\t\tif (window.mermaid) {\n\t\t\twindow.mermaid.run();\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// change banner height immediately when a link is clicked\n\t\tconst bodyElement = document.querySelector('body')\n\t\tif (pathsEqual(visit.to.url, url('/'))) {\n\t\t\tbodyElement!.classList.add('lg:is-home');\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tbodyElement!.classList.remove('lg:is-home');\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// increase the page height during page transition to prevent the scrolling animation from jumping\n\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\theightExtend.classList.remove('hidden')\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Hide the TOC while scrolling back to top\n\t\tlet toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\n\t\tif (toc) {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.add('toc-not-ready')\n\t\t}\n\t});\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('page:view', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// hide the temp high element when the transition is done\n\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\theightExtend.classList.remove('hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t});\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/Layout\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\nfunction toggleSidebarForPostPage(pathname: string) {\n\tconst sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n\tconst mainGrid = document.getElementById('main-grid');\n\tconst mainContainer = document.getElementById('swup-container');\n\t\n\tif (!sidebar || !mainGrid || !mainContainer) return;\n\t\n\tconst isPostPage = pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n\t\n\tif (isPostPage) {\n\t\t// Hide sidebar and adjust grid layout for post pages\n\t\tsidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-1');\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Show sidebar and restore normal grid layout\n\t\tsidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t}\n}\n\n// Initialize on page load\ntoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\n// Setup Swup hooks for client-side navigation\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility immediately when navigation starts\n\t\tconst url = new URL(visit.to.url, window.location.origin);\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(url.pathname);\n\t});\n\t\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility after content is replaced\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\t});\n};\n\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup();\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "        {!siteConfig.toc.enable \u0026\u0026 \u003cdiv id=\"toc\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e}"

        "originalContents": "\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/Layout\u003e\n\n\u003cscript\u003e\nfunction toggleSidebarForPostPage(pathname: string) {\n\tconst sidebar = document.getElementById('sidebar');\n\tconst mainGrid = document.getElementById('main-grid');\n\tconst mainContainer = document.getElementById('swup-container');\n\t\n\tif (!sidebar || !mainGrid || !mainContainer) return;\n\t\n\tconst isPostPage = pathname.startsWith('/posts/');\n\t\n\tif (isPostPage) {\n\t\t// Hide sidebar and adjust grid layout for post pages\n\t\tsidebar.classList.add('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-1');\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Show sidebar and restore normal grid layout\n\t\tsidebar.classList.remove('hidden');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.remove('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[auto]');\n\t\tmainGrid.classList.add('grid-cols-1', 'lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.remove('col-span-1');\n\t\tmainContainer.classList.add('col-span-2', 'lg:col-span-1');\n\t}\n}\n\n// Initialize on page load\ntoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\n// Setup Swup hooks for client-side navigation\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:start', (visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility immediately when navigation starts\n\t\tconst url = new URL(visit.to.url, window.location.origin);\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(url.pathname);\n\t});\n\t\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('content:replace', () =\u003e {\n\t\t// Update sidebar visibility after content is replaced\n\t\ttoggleSidebarForPostPage(window.location.pathname);\n\t});\n};\n\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup();\n",

        "originalContents": "\n\n// https://astro.build/config\nexport default defineConfig({\n\tsite: \"https://tutttuwi.github.io\",\n\tbase: \"/\",\n\ttrailingSlash: \"always\",\n\tintegrations: [\n\t\ttailwind({\n\t\t\tnesting: true,\n\t\t}),\n\t\tswup({\n\t\t\ttheme: false,\n\t\t\tanimationClass: \"transition-swup-\", // see https://swup.js.org/options/#animationselector\n\t\t\t// the default value &#96;transition-&#96; cause transition delay\n\t\t\t// when the Tailwind class &#96;transition-all&#96; is used\n\t\t\tcontainers: [\"main\", \"#toc\"],\n\t\t\tsmoothScrolling: true,\n\t\t\tcache: true,\n\t\t\tpreload: true,\n\t\t\taccessibility: true,\n\t\t\tupdateHead: true,\n\t\t\tupdateBodyClass: false,\n\t\t\tglobalInstance: true,\n\t\t}),\n\t\ticon({\n\t\t\tinclude: {\n\t\t\t\t\"preprocess: vitePreprocess(),\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t\t\"fa6-brands\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t\t\"fa6-regular\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t\t\"fa6-solid\": [\"*\"],\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}),\n\t\texpressiveCode({\n\t\t\tthemes: [expressiveCodeConfig.theme, expressiveCodeConfig.theme],\n\t\t\tplugins: [\n\t\t\t\tpluginCollapsibleSections(),\n\t\t\t\tpluginLineNumbers(),\n\t\t\t\tpluginLanguageBadge(),\n\t\t\t\tpluginCustomCopyButton()\n\t\t\t],\n\t\t\tdefaultProps: {\n\t\t\t\twrap: true,\n\t\t\t\toverridesByLang: {\n\t\t\t\t\t'shellsession': {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tshowLineNumbers: false,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t'mermaid': {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// Exclude mermaid from expressive-code processing\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// It will be handled by our custom rehype plugin\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t// Exclude mermaid language from processing\n\t\t\texcludeLanguages: ['mermaid'],",

        "contents": "function showBanner() {\n\tif (!siteConfig.banner.enable) return;\n\n\tconst banner = document.getElementById('banner');\n\tif (!banner) {\n\t\tconsole.error('Banner element not found');\n\t\treturn;\n\t}\n\n\tbanner.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'scale-105');\n}\n\nfunction init() {\n\t// disableAnimation()()\t\t// TODO\n\tloadTheme();\n\tloadHue();\n\tinitCustomScrollbar();\n\tshowBanner();\n}\n\n/* Load settings when entering the site */\ninit();\n\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\t// TODO: temp solution to change the height of the banner\n/*\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('animation:out:start', () =\u003e {\n\t\tconst path = window.location.pathname\n\t\tconst body = document.querySelector('body')\n\t\tif (path[path.length - 1] === '/' \u0026\u0026 !body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.add('is-home')\n\t\t} else if (path[path.length - 1] !== '/' \u0026\u0026 body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.remove('is-home')\n\t\t}\n\t})\n",

        "originalContents": "function showBanner() {\n\tif (!siteConfig.banner.enable) return;\n\n\tconst banner = document.getElementById('banner');\n\tif (!banner) {\n\t\tconsole.error('Banner element not found');\n\t\treturn;\n\t}\n\n\tbanner.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'scale-105');\n}\n\nfunction init() {\n\t// disableAnimation()()\t\t// TODO\n\tloadTheme();\n\tloadHue();\n\tinitCustomScrollbar();\n\tshowBanner();\n}\n\n/* Load settings when entering the site */\ninit();\n\nconst setup = () =\u003e {\n\t// TODO: temp solution to change the height of the banner\n/*\n\twindow.swup.hooks.on('animation:out:start', () =\u003e {\n\t\tconst path = window.location.pathname\n\t\tconst body = document.querySelector('body')\n\t\tif (path[path.length - 1] === '/' \u0026\u0026 !body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.add('is-home')\n\t\t} else if (path[path.length - 1] !== '/' \u0026\u0026 body.classList.contains('is-home')) {\n\t\t\tbody.classList.remove('is-home')\n\t\t}\n\t})\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:end', (_visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\t\theightExtend.classList.add('hidden')\n\t\t\t}\n\n            // Just make the transition looks better\n            const toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\n            if (toc) {\n                toc.classList.remove('toc-not-ready')\n            }\n        }, 200)\n\t});\n}\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup()\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup)\n}\n\nlet backToTopBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top-btn');\nlet toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\nlet navbar = document.getElementById('navbar-wrapper')\nfunction scrollFunction() {\n\tlet bannerHeight = window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT / 100)\n\n\tif (backToTopBtn) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.remove('hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.add('hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (bannerEnabled \u0026\u0026 toc) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.remove('toc-hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.add('toc-hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (!bannerEnabled) return\n\tif (navbar) {\n\t\tconst NAVBAR_HEIGHT = 72\n\t\tconst MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT = MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT * 16\t\t\t// The height the main panel overlaps the banner\n\n\t\tlet bannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT\n\t\tif (document.body.classList.contains('lg:is-home') \u0026\u0026 window.innerWidth \u003e= 1024) {\n\t\t\tbannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT_HOME\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet threshold = window.innerHeight * (bannerHeight / 100) - NAVBAR_HEIGHT - MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT - 16\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.remove('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\nwindow.onscroll = scrollFunction\n\n",

        "originalContents": "\twindow.swup.hooks.on('visit:end', (_visit: {to: {url: string}}) =\u003e {\n\t\tsetTimeout(() =\u003e {\n\t\t\tconst heightExtend = document.getElementById('page-height-extend')\n\t\t\tif (heightExtend) {\n\t\t\t\theightExtend.classList.add('hidden')\n\t\t\t}\n\n            // Just make the transition looks better\n            const toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\n            if (toc) {\n                toc.classList.remove('toc-not-ready')\n            }\n        }, 200)\n\t});\n}\nif (window?.swup?.hooks) {\n\tsetup()\n} else {\n\tdocument.addEventListener('swup:enable', setup)\n}\n\nlet backToTopBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top-btn');\nlet toc = document.getElementById('toc-wrapper');\nlet navbar = document.getElementById('navbar-wrapper')\nfunction scrollFunction() {\n\tlet bannerHeight = window.innerHeight * (BANNER_HEIGHT / 100)\n\n\tif (backToTopBtn) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.remove('hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tbackToTopBtn.classList.add('hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (bannerEnabled \u0026\u0026 toc) {\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e bannerHeight) {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.remove('toc-hide')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\ttoc.classList.add('toc-hide')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (!bannerEnabled) return\n\tif (navbar) {\n\t\tconst NAVBAR_HEIGHT = 72\n\t\tconst MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT = MAIN_PANEL_OVERLAPS_BANNER_HEIGHT * 16\t\t\t// The height the main panel overlaps the banner\n\n\t\tlet bannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT\n\t\tif (document.body.classList.contains('lg:is-home') \u0026\u0026 window.innerWidth \u003e= 1024) {\n\t\t\tbannerHeight = BANNER_HEIGHT_HOME\n\t\t}\n\t\tlet threshold = window.innerHeight * (bannerHeight / 100) - NAVBAR_HEIGHT - MAIN_PANEL_EXCESS_HEIGHT - 16\n\t\tif (document.body.scrollTop \u003e= threshold || document.documentElement.scrollTop \u003e= threshold) {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.add('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tnavbar.classList.remove('navbar-hidden')\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\nwindow.onscroll = scrollFunction\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/* Page transition animations with Swup */\nhtml.is-changing .transition-swup-fade {\n    @apply transition-all duration-200\n}\nhtml.is-animating .transition-swup-fade {\n    @apply opacity-0 translate-y-4\n}\n\n/* Fade-in animations for components */\n@keyframes fade-in-up {\n    0% {\n        transform: translateY(2rem);\n        opacity: 0;\n    }\n    100% {\n        transform: translateY(0);\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Main components */\n.onload-animation {\n    opacity: 0;\n    animation: 300ms fade-in-up;\n    animation-fill-mode: forwards;\n}\n#navbar {\n    animation-delay: 0ms\n}\n#sidebar {\n    animation-delay: 100ms\n}\n#swup-container {\n    outline: none;\n}\n#content-wrapper {\n    animation-delay: var(--content-delay);\n}\n.footer {\n    animation-delay: 250ms;\n}\n#banner-credit {\n    animation-delay: 400ms;\n}\n\n/* Post content */\n#post-container :nth-child(1) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 0ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(2) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 50ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(3) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 100ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(4) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 175ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(5) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 250ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(6) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 325ms) }\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/* Page transition animations with Swup */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "html.is-changing .transition-swup-fade {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    @apply transition-all duration-200"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "html.is-animating .transition-swup-fade {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    @apply opacity-0 translate-y-4"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "/* Fade-in animations for components */"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "@keyframes fade-in-up {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    0% {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        transform: translateY(2rem);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        opacity: 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    100% {"

        "originalContents": "/* Page transition animations with Swup */\nhtml.is-changing .transition-swup-fade {\n    @apply transition-all duration-200\n}\nhtml.is-animating .transition-swup-fade {\n    @apply opacity-0 translate-y-4\n}\n\n/* Fade-in animations for components */\n@keyframes fade-in-up {\n    0% {\n        transform: translateY(2rem);\n        opacity: 0;\n    }\n    100% {\n        transform: translateY(0);\n        opacity: 1;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Main components */\n.onload-animation {\n    opacity: 0;\n    animation: 300ms fade-in-up;\n    animation-fill-mode: forwards;\n}\n#navbar {\n    animation-delay: 0ms\n}\n#sidebar {\n    animation-delay: 100ms\n}\n#swup-container {\n    outline: none;\n}\n#content-wrapper {\n    animation-delay: var(--content-delay);\n}\n.footer {\n    animation-delay: 250ms;\n}\n#banner-credit {\n    animation-delay: 400ms;\n}\n\n/* Post content */\n#post-container :nth-child(1) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 0ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(2) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 50ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(3) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 100ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(4) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 175ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(5) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 250ms) }\n#post-container :nth-child(6) { animation-delay: calc(var(--content-delay) + 325ms) }\n\n",
        "range": {

            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

\"grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[auto]\" : \"grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-[17.5rem_auto]\"\n        ]}\n        \u003e\n            \u003c!-- Banner image credit --\u003e\n            {hasBannerCredit \u0026\u0026 \u003ca href={siteConfig.banner.credit.url} id=\"banner-credit\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener\" aria-label=\"Visit image source\"\n                                   class:list={[\"group onload-animation transition-all absolute flex justify-center items-center rounded-full \" +\n                                   \"px-3 right-4 -top-[3.25rem] bg-black/60 hover:bg-black/70 h-9\", {\"hover:pr-9 active:bg-black/80\": hasBannerLink}]}\n            \u003e\n                \u003cIcon class=\"text-white/75 text-[1.25rem] mr-1\" name=\"material-symbols:copyright-outline-rounded\" \u003e\u003c/Icon\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"text-white/75 text-xs\"\u003e{siteConfig.banner.credit.text}\u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cIcon class:list={[\"transition absolute text-[oklch(0.75_0.14_var(--hue))] right-4 text-[0.75rem] opacity-0\",\n                    {\"group-hover:opacity-100\": hasBannerLink}]}\n                      name=\"fa6-solid:arrow-up-right-from-square\"\u003e\n                \u003c/Icon\u003e\n            \u003c/a\u003e}\n\n\n            \u003cSideBar class=\"mb-4 row-start-2 row-end-3 col-span-2 lg:row-start-1 lg:row-end-2 lg:col-span-1 lg:max-w-[17.5rem] onload-animation\" headings={headings}\u003e\u003c/SideBar\u003e\n\n            \u003cmain id=\"swup-container\" class:list={[\n                \"transition-swup-fade overflow-hidden min-w-0\",\n                isPostPage ?
